Planning Center API
Table of Contents

Class PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>

Namespace
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.Models
Assembly
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.dll

Provides a base class for making strongly-typed HTTP requests to a specified paginated resource endpoint.

public abstract class PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse> : ResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse> where TResponse : ResourceResponse<TResource>

Type Parameters

TModel

The type of the model being requested.

TResource

The type of the resource being requested.

TResponse

The type of the response being returned.

Inheritance
object
ResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>
PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>

ResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>.PatchAsync(TModel, CancellationToken)
ResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>.DeleteAsync(CancellationToken)
ResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>.DeserializeResponseAsync(HttpResponseMessage, CancellationToken)

Constructors

PaginatedResourceClient(HttpClient, Uri)

Provides a base class for making strongly-typed HTTP requests to a specified paginated resource endpoint.

protected PaginatedResourceClient(HttpClient client, Uri uri)

Parameters

client HttpClient

The HTTP client to use for making requests.

uri Uri

The URI of the paginated resource endpoint.

Methods

Skip(int)

Sets the number of items to skip in the paginated response. This sets the "offset" query parameter.

public PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse> Skip(int count)

Parameters

count int

The number of items to skip.

Returns

PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>

The current instance of the paginated resource client.

Take(int)

Sets the number of items to be returned per page in the paginated response. This sets the "per_page" query parameter.

public PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse> Take(int count)

Parameters

count int

The number of items to be returned per page.

Returns

PaginatedResourceClient<TModel, TResource, TResponse>

The current instance of the paginated resource client.
